question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Perpignan will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2025-05-11?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07747.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-05-11 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-05-01) was 16.738. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Perpignan.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - PERPIGNAN - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07747.D.
